cases.name: Anchored escrow release settles cleanly on Base
cases.notes: Capital instruction, bond state, anchor proof, and settlement receipt reconcile without mutating prior Chio truth.

cases.name: Partial settlement remains explicit and auditable
cases.notes: Partial execution is represented as a distinct lifecycle state rather than an overloaded success flag.

cases.name: Custody and regulated-role assumptions stay explicit
cases.notes: The trust profile preserves the operator, custodian, and arbitrator role split for the official web3 stack.

cases.name: Reversal and recovery remain bounded and reviewable
cases.notes: Reversal, chargeback, and timeout semantics are modeled as explicit lifecycle states with preserved evidence.
